posts.text:
BREAKING: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says the US and Iran are "closer to a peace deal than ever" with finalization of the deal expected in the next 24 hours.

Pakistan is now preparing for the electronic signing of the peace deal, followed by technical level talks next week.

"We are confident that this historic peace deal will form a strong foundation for lasting peace," he says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
